generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in port environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time crane state data including swing angle and wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for storing historical crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service deployment and isolation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for trajectory generation, simulation, and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization tool for real-time data dashboarding"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation using physical parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging service using TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and operator interface via Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTrendInsight, OperatorControlAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation service using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Crane dynamics simulation service for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AlertInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker service for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance AlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance DataTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data trends and confidence bounds for operator decision-making"
]

instance TrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal path for cart and hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator commands for crane configuration and movement control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for continuous validation"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data storage and retrieval for historical analysis"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of data transmission via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along the gantry rail"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance ContainerPickupElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at the hoist end"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for interfacing sensors and actuators"
]

instance TMC4671MotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controllers for precise stepper motor control"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, ContainerPickupElectromagnet, ArduinoController, TMC4671MotorController, DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with physical crane motor controllers via a Python-based Physical Crane Interface for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with measurements and simulations compared in real-time by the Continuous Validation Service, and data logged continuously by the Logging Application."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) interact with digital services via MQTT and TimescaleDB, as visualized using C4 Model architecture with context and container diagrams showing high-level interactions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers both as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as-operated (real-time data logging and control) phases of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing values against predefined thresholds to ensure validity and trigger operator notifications when thresholds are breached."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto for inter-service communication; Python-based Physical Crane Interface for controller communication with the physical hardware."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Containerized services (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) deployed via Docker Compose on a single personal computer, with Python modules installed via pip for easy deployment."
]
